name: Preprocessor Skip Rules for Task Types
description: Skips task preprocessing for utility task types: Test Verification, Build Investigation, Generate Suggestions, and Build Test. These tasks execute directly with user prompts, bypassing Haiku preprocessing and feature context injection.
